scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage:backend && npm run test:coverage:frontend
scripts.typecheck: cd backend && npx tsc --noEmit && cd ../frontend && npx tsc --noEmit
scripts.lint: cd backend && npx eslint src/ && cd ../frontend && npx eslint src/
scripts.lint:fix: cd backend && npx eslint src/ --fix && cd ../frontend && npx eslint src/ --fix
